items: Oral Communication on Closed Session Items Only
If you have public comment related to a Closed Session item, please post it on the links available under Public Content prior to the Closed Session Meeting or immediately upon the meeting opening.

llmResponse.agenda_changes: Items 11.2 (Measure U Addendum) and 11.3 (Personnel Changes) were moved from Action Items to Consent Items
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: Can I have a motion to move all on the consent list, including 11.2 and 11.3

items.intro_words: We are reconvening to regular session. Sorry for the delay.

And Moving on to 9.1, first reading and discussion of board policy
So Moving on to 9.2, first reading and discussion of board policy
we'll move right along to item 9.3. First reading and discussion

Moving on to 11.1. Recommendation regarding adoption of Resolution 17
And now we're on to 12.1 reports from board members and superintendents.
